  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  This is a last.fm plugin for the CMUS
  ncurses based music-player. Written in
  Python.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/last-cmus/
  
  PR:             ports/129299
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
